intelligence_signals.summary: OpenAI released a focused agent infrastructure update that adds new execution controls, tool-use boundaries, and monitoring hooks for production agent systems.
intelligence_signals.title: OpenAI releases agent infrastructure update
intelligence_signals.watch_next: Track follow-up benchmark evidence, enterprise adoption signals, and whether OpenAI exposes more controls for agent reliability evaluation.
intelligence_signals.why_it_matters: This signals a shift from demo-centric agent releases toward operational infrastructure because reliability, tool boundaries, and monitoring directly affect whether agent systems can be trusted in high-value workflows.

intelligence_signals.summary: This is important. AI is transforming everything.
intelligence_signals.title: AI changes everything
